jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group!
